uk: Неділя 20-та по Зісланні Святого Духа. Свв. Отців Сьомого Вселенського Собору. Глас 3. Єв. 9.
Св. апостола Филипа, одного із семи дияконів
Преподобного Теофана Начертанного, єпископа Нікейського і творця канонів
saints.en: 19th Sunday, of the Holy Fathers of the Seventh Ecumenical Council. St. Apostle Philip, One of the Seven Deacons. Ven. Theophanes the Branded, Bishop of Nicaea and Hymnographer

rubrics:
Вечірня: «Блажен муж». На «Господи, взиваю» – 10 стихир: 4 воскрес. і 6 Отців, Слава: Отців, І нині: богородичний-догмат 3-го гл. Вхід. Прокімен дня. Три читання: Буття 14:14-20, Второзакон. 1:8-11.15-17, Второзакон. 10:14-21. Стиховня воскресна, Слава: Отців, І нині: богород. з недільної стиховні за гласом Отців. Тропар воскресний, Слава: Отців, І нині: богород. недільний за гласом тр. Отців. Відпуст великий з помин. недільним і Отців.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар воскресний (2), Слава: Отців, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тр. Отців. Катизми черг. з воскрес. сідальними. Полієлей і «Ангельський собор», мала єктенія, іпакой, степенна і прокімен 3-го гласу. Єв. – Ів. 65 зач.; 20, 19-31. Все інше до канону – неділі. Канон воскресний, хрестовоскресний, Богородиці і Отців. Катавасія: «Відкрию уста мої». По 3-ій пісні – кондак-ікос воскресні, сідальний Отців. По 6-ій – кондак-ікос Отців. По 9-ій – світильний недільний, Слава: світильний Отців, І нині: богород. світильного Отців. Хвалитних стихир – 8: 4 воскрес. і 4 Отців (з приспівами «Благословен єси, Господи, Боже отців наших» і «Зберіть Йому преподобних Його»). Слава: Отців, І нині: «Преблагословенна». По великому славослов'ї – тропар «Сьогодні спасіння світу». Відпуст великий з помин. служби недільної і Отців. По відпусті – Слава, І нині: стихира євангельська.
Часи: на всіх – тропар воскресний, також Слава: Отців, кондаки: на 1-му і 6-му – воскресний, на 3-му і 9-му – Отців.
Літургія: антифони: два перших – воскресні, а третій – звичайний з воскресним приспівом, а також і «Прийдіте, поклонімся». Тропар воскресний і Отців, також кондак воскресний, Слава: Отців, І нині: богород. за гласом Сл. Прокімен, апостол, алилуя, євангелія і причасний – спочатку неділі, а після – Отців. Ряд.: Ап. – Гал. 200 зач.; 1, 11-19. Єв. – Лк. 30 зач.; 7, 11-16. Отців: Ап. – Євр. 334 зач.; 13, 7-16. Єв. – Ів. 56 зач.; 17, 1-13.

troparion_en.text: Most glorious art Thou, O Christ our God,  / Who hast established the Holy Fathers as luminaries on the earth. /  By them Thou hast guided us on the path of the True Faith. /  O Most Merciful One, glory to Thee!

kontakion_en.text: The Son, Who shone forth ineffably from the Father,  /  was born of a woman, in two natures.  /  Beholding Him, we do not deny the image of His form,  /  but depicting it piously, we revere it with faith.  /  Therefore, the Church, holding the True Faith,  /  venerates the Icon of Christ's Incarnation.

matched_oca_saint: Commemoration of the Holy Fathers of the Seventh Ecumenical Council

oca_saints.name: Commemoration of the Holy Fathers of the Seventh Ecumenical Council

troparion.text: Most glorious art Thou, O Christ our God,  / Who hast established the Holy Fathers as luminaries on the earth. /  By them Thou hast guided us on the path of the True Faith. /  O Most Merciful One, glory to Thee!

kontakion.text: The Son, Who shone forth ineffably from the Father,  /  was born of a woman, in two natures.  /  Beholding Him, we do not deny the image of His form,  /  but depicting it piously, we revere it with faith.  /  Therefore, the Church, holding the True Faith,  /  venerates the Icon of Christ's Incarnation.

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Philotheus, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

oca_saints.name: Apostle Philip of the Seventy, One of the Seven Deacons

troparion.text: Filled with divine grace, / you served God the Word as a deacon of the Church, O Apostle Philip. / By the working of miracles and by signs from God / you enlightened the multitudes of Samaria. / O blessed one, entreat Christ our God to grant us His great mercy.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “Today You have shown forth...”)
Inspired by the All-Holy Spirit, / you enlightened the entire world by your teachings and resplendent miracles, / Apostle Philip, sacred initiate.

oca_saints.name: Saint Theophanes the Confessor and Hymnographer, Bishop of Nicea

troparion.text: Having attained an angelic state, / you sounded forth as a golden trumpet of revelation / and nourished the chosen people with your words. / The singing of your hymns gladdens the Church, / for which you struggled, O Theophanes.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “Today You have shown forth...”)
You dawned on the Church like a second sun, venerable Theophanes, / enlightening her with the beams of your teachings / as a priest of Christ our God.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Theophanes the Faster of the Kiev Near Caves

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Theophanes, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Leonid, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Synaxis of the Venerable Fathers of Optina

troparion.text: O lamps of the Orthodox Faith, unshakable pillars of monasticism,  /  intercessors for the land of Russia, Venerable Elders of Optina,  /  who acquired the love of Christ and devoted your lives to your children; /  entreat the Lord that your earthly homeland may be established in Orthodoxy and piety, and that our souls may be saved.

kontakion.text: Truly wondrous is God in His Saints, Who revealed the Hermitage of Optina as a garden of eldership, /  where the God-enlightened Fathers, knowing the secrets of the human heart, became valiant protectors of the people of God;  /  for they set those burdened by sin on the path of repentance,  /  enlightening those whose faith was wavering with the light of Christ's teachings,  /  and teaching them the wisdom of God,  /  they felt compassion for the sick and healed them.  /  Now, in God's glory, they pray unceasingly for our souls.

oca_saints.name: Virgin Martyrs Zenaΐda and Philonίlla, of Tarsus in Cilicia

troparion.text: O rational lambs of Christ the Lamb and Shepherd, /  you were led to martyrdom, finishing the course of your life and preserving your faith.  / Therefore, we celebrate your holy memory today with joyful souls,  / for you are worthy of admiration and are glorified by Christ.

kontakion.text: Having obtained your all-holy temple as a source of healing for our souls, /   all the faithful cry out to you: /   “O Virgin Martyr Zenaΐda, whose name is glorious, /   never cease to entreat Christ God for all of us.”

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy mother Ethelburga, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
